title: SVVideo
description: SVVideo is a powerful Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.21.1 that lets you play videos, music, GIFs, and media directly inside the game. Perfect for events, cinematics, and immersive servers.
body:
### 🎬 SVVideo

**SVVideo is a powerful multimedia mod for Minecraft Fabric 1.21.1 that allows server operators and map creators to play videos, music, GIFs, and local media directly inside the game.

Designed for performance and flexibility, SVVideo lets you create immersive cinematic experiences, in-game events, and dynamic environments with full control over playback and rendering.**

### **🔥 Features**

**_🎥 Fullscreen video and music playback
🖥️ Block-based video screens placed in the world
📏 Customizable display size (width & height)
📁 Local media playback from /svvideo folder
🌐 Support for direct media URLs
🎵 Music HUD (title, duration, progress, thumbnail/logo)
⚙️ Per-display render quality control
🔊 Distance-based audio system
🛠️ Operator commands for full control_**

### **🎮 Use Cases

Perfect for:

Events
Roleplay servers
Minigames
Lobbies
Cinematic maps
In-game presentations**

### 🧾 Commands


```
/svvideo stop <targets>

/svvideo volume <targets> <0-100>

/svvideo video <targets> <0-100> <url>

/svvideo music <targets> <0-100> <url>

/svvideo file <targets> <0-100> <file>

/svvideo gif url <targets> <0-100> <position> <url>

/svvideo gif file <targets> <0-100> <position> <file>

/svvideo playblock <x> <y> <z> <targets> <0-100> <file>

/svvideo playblock <x> <y> <z> <targets> <0-100> <file> <width> <height>
```


### 📍 GIF Positions


```
fullscreen
center
top-center
actionbar
bottom-left
bottom-right
top-right
top-left
```


### 💡 Examples

```

/svvideo stop @a
/svvideo volume @a 50

/svvideo video @a 100 https://example.com/video.mp4
/svvideo music @a 100 https://example.com/music.mp3

/svvideo file @a 100 intro.mp4

/svvideo gif url @a 100 center https://example.com/anim.gif
/svvideo gif file @a 100 top-right anim.gif

/svvideo playblock 19 -58 7 @a 100 3.mp4
/svvideo playblock 19 -58 7 @a 100 3.mp4 8 8
```


### 🔒 Permissions

All commands require Operator (permission level 2).

### 🔧 Dependencies

```
Fabric API
WATERMEDIA: Multimedia Binaries (Required)
WATERMeDIA: Multimedia API (Version 3.0.0.15 required)
WATERMeDIA: Youtube Extension (Optional, required to play YouTube videos — client-side only)
```
